name: Daggubati bapaiah chowdary
projectDescription:
The StudentMeet backend currently sends email notifications only to the admin.

Fix the email system so that TWO emails are sent after a project request submission.

1. Admin Notification Email
   Send email to:
   [daggubatibapaiahchowdary@gmail.com](mailto:daggubatibapaiahchowdary@gmail.com)

Subject:
New Project Request - StudentMeet

Content should include:
Client name
Email
Project title
Budget
Deadline

2. Client Confirmation Email
   Send email to the user's email address from the form.

Subject:
StudentMeet - Project Request Received

Email content:

Hello [Name],

Thank you for submitting your project request on StudentMeet.

Project Title: [Project Title]

I will review your request and contact you soon.

Regards
StudentMeet

3. Ensure the email is sent using Nodemailer.

Example structure:

await transporter.sendMail(adminMailOptions);
await transporter.sendMail(userMailOptions);

4. Make sure the user email is taken from req.body.email.

5. Add error logging if the second email fails.

6. Do not break the API if email fails.
